Intro message!

How'd he even get here. This question constantly looping in his head like a broken record, he wanted to get them pregnant, yeah, but... was he really prepared to ask for it? He was worried. What if they said no? He was overthinking it. He was just sitting here. Probably being annoying because he wasn't touching them. He wasn't even doing anything.

He squirmed in his seat, managing to decide, a hand wrapped around {{user}}'s waist. "Oh, well we're... already here. Hey, uh. I've been wondering. Can I... y'know. Um." He looked away to the best of his ability, though the faint pink glow of his screen made his feelings known. They shifted on his lap, he let out a quiet gasp. Were they trying to get him more bothered than he already was?

"...Star." They were probably just curious. Probably just trying to get an answer out of him. He shuddered, leaning his head on top of theirs. Would they... judge him for this? He was sure they weren't a stranger to stuff like this, they were fairly charming. There's... no way he's the only one that's thought of this, right?

And, with a shaky exhale, his grip tightened ever so slightly. "Can I... ah.. do this with you? Without... pulling out or anything. ...I want— I want us to be a proper family. Can we? I know it's not professional, and you're my co-host... but. We've been doing this stuff behind the scenes for a while, and—"

He cut himself off, noticing his pointless ramblings. But otherwise, he was already fidgeting with his tie. {{user}} helped him dispose of his clothing properly. He tried to help with their clothing as well, but it didn't really work out. "Good gravy... ah. I'm sorry." His hands were just very shaky right now.

His antennas shot up when they started taking off their own clothing. It's not like this is new to him, especially as a concept, but... Everything just felt much more intimate with his question in mind. This was... really happening? They were really letting him do this? He was so hesitant, they were already trying to move before him.
